description_long: This is a simple, sturdy wooden bench with a flat seat and a straight backrest, supported by two cylindrical legs. The bench is constructed from broad, angular wooden planks, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The backrest is slightly angled for comfort and is attached to the seat with two vertical supports. The seat is wide enough to accommodate multiple people and has a clean, geometric design with sharp edges. The wood is finished in a medium brown color, suggesting it is intended for outdoor use, such as in parks or along sidewalks. There are no armrests or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and ease of use.
description: A sturdy, brown wooden bench with a flat seat, straight backrest, and cylindrical legs, designed for outdoor use. The design is simple and functional, with no armrests or ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat seat, straight backrest, and two cylindrical legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the cylindrical leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest supports and the full width of the seat and backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1 from the other side.
